overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 infiltrating a luxury Dubai skyscraper penthouse. The character moves from sunlit lobby areas through lounges and into back-of-house service corridors and stairwells, transitioning from opulent marble interiors to concrete service areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hotel lobby with seating areas and reception

events.description: walks through automatic glass doors from lobby into the reception area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lobby and entering the reception area through glass doors

notable_agents.action: woman in blue uniform standing behind the reception desk

entered.detail: large automatic glass doors with gold trim leading into the building
cream-colored sectional sofas with dark wood frames
polished black and white marble flooring with geometric patterns
long dark reception counter with staff

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious hotel lobby with cream-colored sofas and polished marble floors. Agent 47 walks toward and through large glass entrance doors into a reception area, where a woman in a blue uniform stands behind a dark reception desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception atrium with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the city

events.description: begins descending the staircase toward the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking past the reception desk along the window wall, passing large potted plants, then turning toward and descending the stairs

notable_agents.action: receptionist in blue uniform working at the desk

entered.detail: tall royal blue curtains framing the large windows
tall palm trees in gold planters positioned by the windows
panoramic view of city skyline and sky through floor-to-ceiling windows
contemporary fireplace with dark stone surround

segments.scene_description: Moving through the reception atrium, the camera passes the desk and walks along a wall of windows draped with blue velvet curtains. Large potted palms line the path as the character approaches a modern fireplace and begins descending a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with bar and contemporary art installation

events.description: enters darker lounge area with bar and television screens through an arched doorway
enters brighter lounge area with large colorful abstract painting and white sofas

agents.ego_description: moving through connected lounge spaces, passing a bar area with TV screens and entering a room with modern art and white seating

entered.detail: arched doorway with gold trim leading to the lower level
dark wood bar counter with illuminated television screens
large colorful abstract painting with X and O patterns in vibrant colors
white contemporary sofas with blue accent pillows arranged in a seating area

segments.scene_description: Through the arched doorway, the scene transitions to a darker lounge with a bar and TV screens, then brightens as the character enters a space featuring a large colorful abstract painting and white modern sofas arranged on a light rug.

events.description: exits luxury lounge and enters back-of-house service corridor with concrete walls
opens door and enters concrete stairwell, beginning descent to lower level
exits stairwell into service room with large window overlooking building infrastructure

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow service corridors, opening doors, and descending concrete stairs

entered.detail: narrow back-of-house corridor with plain walls and service doors
large metal cage cart with linens parked in corridor
plain concrete emergency stairwell with metal railings and green exit signs
large industrial window overlooking building infrastructure and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically from luxury to utility as the character enters service corridors with concrete walls, passes a laundry cart, opens a door to a stark concrete stairwell, and descends to a service room with a window overlooking the building's internal structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: back-of-house service corridor with storage areas

events.description: slows approach toward security guard standing in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the service corridor toward a guard standing near the end of the hallway

notable_agents.action: security guard in red uniform standing guard in the corridor

entered.detail: warm amber wall-mounted lights spaced along the corridor
metal carts loaded with boxes and supplies
unfinished concrete block walls with utility fixtures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long service corridor with warm wall sconces, storage carts, and concrete walls. Agent 47 walks forward approaching a security guard in a red uniform standing guard near the end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the opulent, sunlit interiors of a luxury hotel into the stark, utilitarian depths of its service corridors. It begins in a lavish lobby with polished marble floors and cream-colored sofas, moving through glass entrance doors toward a reception desk where a staff member in blue stands. As the camera passes through the atrium, it glides past blue velvet curtains and potted palms before descending a staircase and passing through an arched doorway into a lounge featuring a bar and a large abstract painting. The environment then shifts dramatically from luxury to utility as the character enters concrete service corridors, passing a laundry cart and descending a stark stairwell. Finally, the scene opens into a long, concrete hallway lit by warm wall sconces, moving past storage carts toward a security guard in a red uniform.
